mapper.select: SELECT title_ja AS title, contents_ja AS contents, `time` FROM hp_contents_announcement ORDER BY `time` DESC
SELECT title_zh AS title, contents_zh AS contents, `time` FROM hp_contents_announcement ORDER BY `time` DESC
SELECT title_en AS title, contents_en AS contents, `time` FROM hp_contents_announcement ORDER BY `time` DESC
SELECT title, contents_ja AS contents FROM hp_contents_patch_note ORDER BY title DESC
SELECT title, contents_zh AS contents FROM hp_contents_patch_note ORDER BY title DESC
SELECT title, contents_en AS contents FROM hp_contents_patch_note ORDER BY title DESC
